name: ##   1. Delete ALL rows that start with ## (these are instructions only)
##   2. Keep row 1 exactly as-is — it is the required header row
##   3. Add one product per row below the header
##   sku         OPTIONAL  — Your internal product code
##                           Leave blank if you do not use SKUs
##                           Must be unique per vendor if provided
##   unit_type   REQUIRED  — How the product is sold / measured
##                           Accepted values (case-insensitive): case / lb / oz / each / bag / gallon / pallet
##   unit_size   REQUIRED  — Size or quantity per unit
##   price       REQUIRED  — Unit price as a plain number (no $ sign)
##   • All imported products default to In Stock
##   • Do NOT rename or rearrange the header row columns
##   • Rows with errors will be rejected and shown in the preview
##   • You can fix and re-upload rejected rows separately
